assertions.description: Output includes a numbered cleaning checklist in logical sequence (structural changes before value standardization)
Editorial judgement calls are separated from mechanical cleaning steps in a distinct section
At least one 'do not change' instruction is included for fields that should be left as-is

assertion_results.note: Numbered steps: dedup first, then date standardization, then sentence_length normalization, then name standardization
Editorial sign-off section separated: judge name merges, offense category consolidation
Do not change: case_id and original_text fields preserved as-is
Steps in order: dedup, date format, title case
Editorial section notes title capitalization judgment
Do not change: checkout counts and branch names left as-is
Steps: dedup, country code standardization, date format, budget range parsing, category language normalization
Editorial sign-off: multilingual organization name merges, budget range boundary decisions
Do not change: registration_number and original language organization names preserved in separate column

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
